content.data: Do these two steps in order: (1) run the shell command  yes x | head -c 60000 | tr -d "\n" > big.txt  to create a file, then (2) use your file reading tool to read big.txt and tell me only how many characters are on its first line.

input.__tool_use_purpose: Create big.txt with 60000 'x' characters and no newlines

tool.tool_use_purpose: Create big.txt with 60000 'x' characters and no newlines

input.__tool_use_purpose: Read big.txt to check first line

tool.tool_use_purpose: Read big.txt to check first line

content.data: The first line has **60,000 characters** (all `x`s, no newlines).
